why_it_matters: An actively started antihypertensive must be documented to avoid duplicate ACE-inhibitor/other therapy, guide monitoring for hyperkalemia/angioedema, and reconcile against the amlodipine-HCTZ noted, or dosing errors and harm may result.

The standardized PRAPARE findings substantiate the housing and utilities interventions central to this visit and clarify insurance status, improving documentation completeness and referral justification.
